deal_name: Nippon Steel North America / United States Steel Corporation

outside_date_extensions.condition: if Sections 7.1–7.3 conditions (excluding Closing-only items and 7.1(b)/(c) relating to Required Approvals) are not yet satisfied or waived
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date automatically extends from September 18, 2024 to March 18, 2025 if the conditions in Sections 7.1–7.3 (other than Closing-only conditions and those relating to Required Approvals under 7.1(b)/(c)) are satisfied or waived, provided neither Parent nor Merger Sub is in material breach.

outside_date_extensions.condition: if those same conditions remain satisfied or waived as of March 18, 2025
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date automatically extends a second time from March 18, 2025 to June 18, 2025 if the same set of conditions (excluding Closing-only items and 7.1(b)/(c) Required Approvals) are satisfied or waived as of March 18, 2025, provided neither Parent nor Merger Sub is in material breach.

regulatory_approvals.name: CFIUS
regulatory_approvals.notes: CFIUS Approval is explicitly named as a Required Approval and a mutual closing condition; parties must promptly submit draft and formal CFIUS notices and make all requested submissions.

static_events.label: Unanimously approved by the Board of United States Steel Corporation
Outside Date (Ext. 1)
static_events.note: The outside date automatically extends from September 18, 2024 to March 18, 2025 if the conditions in Sections 7.1–7.3 (other than Closing-only conditions and those relating to Required Approvals under 7.1(b)/(c)) are satisfied or waived, provided neither Parent nor Merger Sub is in material breach.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 2)
static_events.note: The outside date automatically extends a second time from March 18, 2025 to June 18, 2025 if the same set of conditions (excluding Closing-only items and 7.1(b)/(c) Required Approvals) are satisfied or waived as of March 18, 2025, provided neither Parent nor Merger Sub is in material breach.

deadline_events.label: CFIUS Clearance
deadline_events.notes: CFIUS Approval is explicitly named as a Required Approval and a mutual closing condition; parties must promptly submit draft and formal CFIUS notices and make all requested submissions.

deadline_events.label: Proxy Statement mailing to shareholder meeting
deadline_events.calculation: United States Steel Corporation must mail the definitive Proxy Statement within 10 Business Days after SEC clearance (Section 6.5(a)).

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Clearance Obtained
downstream.rule: CFIUS Approval is explicitly named as a Required Approval and a mutual closing condition; parties must promptly submit draft and formal CFIUS notices and make all requested submissions.

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +3 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: HSR actual filing date (Nippon Steel North America, Inc. + X)
United States Steel Corporation stockholder meeting date (vote)
